name: adelphos_domain_grant_local_path_for_user
desc: Register a local Windows folder with the Adelphos Domain API so server-side tools can read and write there on the user's behalf. Call once per project folder. Requires MEPBRIDGE_ADELPHOS_TOKEN (LibreChat JWT from chat.adelphos.ai).

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute Windows path, e.g. C:\\JPA Projects\\G0053 - Glanmire\\2.0 Issued\\

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Optional human-readable label (defaults to the path)
